text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Decoupled Weight Decay Regularization" by Ilya Loshchilov and Frank Hutter is entirely real and confirmed at arXiv:1711.05101. The ArXiv ID in the reference is correct, and the venue (ICLR) and authors are accurate. The "year mismatch" flagged by the automated checker is a minor confusion: the paper was first posted to arXiv in November 2017, but was published at ICLR 2019 — citing it as 2019 (the conference publication year) is standard and acceptable practice.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1711.05101
